datasets.name: ds_close_status
queryLines:
SELECT
    5 AS target_days,
        3 AS actual_days_elapsed,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF('2026-02-04', '2026-02-01') <= 5 THEN 'On Track'
        ELSE 'Overdue'
    END AS close_status

datasets.name: ds_close_tasks_pct
queryLines:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_tasks,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_tasks,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'In Progress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS in_progress_tasks,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Not Started' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_started_tasks,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        / COUNT(*), 1
    ) AS pct_completed
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.close_tasks

datasets.name: ds_unreconciled_count
queryLines:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_items,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.acct_invoice_id IS NOT NULL
              AND CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                  = CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.acct_invoice_id IS NULL
              OR  CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                  != CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreconciled_count
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices c
LEFT JOIN christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.accounting_invoices a ON c.crm_invoice_id = a.crm_invoice_id

datasets.name: ds_unreconciled_value
queryLines:
SELECT
    crm.total_crm_revenue,
    acct.total_acct_revenue,
    inv_gap.invoice_variance AS unreconciled_value,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * inv_gap.invoice_variance
        / NULLIF(crm.total_crm_revenue, 0), 2
    ) AS unreconciled_pct
FROM
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_crm_revenue
     FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices) crm,
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_acct_revenue
     FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.accounting_invoices) acct,
    (SELECT SUM(
                CASE
                    WHEN a.acct_invoice_id IS NULL
                        THEN CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                    ELSE ABS(CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                             - CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
                END
            ) AS invoice_variance
     FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices c
     LEFT JOIN christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.accounting_invoices a ON c.crm_invoice_id = a.crm_invoice_id
     WHERE a.acct_invoice_id IS NULL
        OR CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
           != CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    ) inv_gap

datasets.name: ds_journal_ratio
queryLines:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'Automated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS automated_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'Manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS manual_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'Automated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        / COUNT(*), 1
    ) AS auto_pct
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.journal_entries

datasets.name: ds_recon_status
queryLines:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN a.acct_invoice_id IS NULL THEN 'Unmatched-CRM Only'
        WHEN CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
             != CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) THEN 'Variance'
        ELSE 'Matched'
    END AS match_status,
    COUNT(*) AS item_count,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN a.acct_invoice_id IS NULL
                THEN CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
            WHEN CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                 != CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                THEN ABS(CAST(a.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))
                         - CAST(c.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS total_variance
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices c
LEFT JOIN christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.accounting_invoices a ON c.crm_invoice_id = a.crm_invoice_id
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY item_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_crm_vs_acct_revenue
queryLines:
SELECT 'CRM (Source of Truth)' AS source_system,
       SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_revenue
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Accounting (GL Posted)' AS source_system,
       SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_revenue
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.accounting_invoices
ORDER BY source_system

datasets.name: ds_open_issues_owner
queryLines:
SELECT
    owner,
    COUNT(*) AS open_task_count,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN due_date < CURRENT_DATE() THEN DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), due_date)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS total_days_overdue
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.close_tasks
WHERE status != 'Completed'
GROUP BY owner
ORDER BY open_task_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_close_timeline
queryLines:
SELECT
    completed_date,
    COUNT(*) AS tasks_completed_on_day,
    SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY completed_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_completed
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.close_tasks
WHERE status = 'Completed'
  AND completed_date IS NOT NULL
  --AND completed_date != ''
GROUP BY completed_date
ORDER BY completed_date

datasets.name: ds_revenue_kpis
queryLines:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS actual_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS budget_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(prior_year AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS prior_year_revenue,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * (
            SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
                     THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END)
          - SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
                     THEN CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END)
        ) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
                            THEN CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 1) AS budget_variance_pct
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
WHERE period = '2026-01'

datasets.name: ds_gross_margin
queryLines:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Gross Profit'
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS gross_profit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Gross Profit'
                         THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
                          THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 1) AS gross_margin_pct
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
WHERE period = '2026-01'

datasets.name: ds_operating_profit
queryLines:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Operating Income'
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_income_actual,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Operating Income'
             THEN CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_income_budget,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Net Income'
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS net_income_actual
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
WHERE period = '2026-01'

datasets.name: ds_revenue_by_region
queryLines:
SELECT
    c.region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.crm_invoice_id) AS invoice_count,
    SUM(CAST(ci.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CAST(ci.total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
        / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices), 0)
    , 1) AS pct_of_total
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoices ci
JOIN christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.customers c ON ci.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.region
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

datasets.name: ds_revenue_by_category
queryLines:
SELECT
    p.category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cl.crm_invoice_id) AS invoice_count,
    SUM(CAST(cl.line_total AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS category_revenue,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CAST(cl.line_total AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
        / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(CAST(line_total AS DECIMAL(18,2))) FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoice_lines), 0)
    , 1) AS pct_of_total
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.crm_invoice_lines cl
JOIN christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.products p ON cl.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY category_revenue DESC

datasets.name: ds_pnl_variance
queryLines:
SELECT
    line_item,
    CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS actual,
    CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS budget,
    CAST(prior_year AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS prior_year,
    CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS actual_vs_budget,
    CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(prior_year AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS actual_vs_prior_year,
    ROUND(
        100.0 * (CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
        / NULLIF(ABS(CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))), 0)
    , 1) AS budget_variance_pct
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
WHERE period = '2026-01'
ORDER BY
    CASE line_item
        WHEN 'Product Revenue' THEN 1
        WHEN 'Service Revenue' THEN 2
        WHEN 'Returns & Allowances' THEN 3
        WHEN 'Cost of Goods Sold' THEN 4
        WHEN 'Gross Profit' THEN 5
        WHEN 'Salaries & Wages' THEN 6
        WHEN 'Rent & Occupancy' THEN 7
        WHEN 'Marketing & Advertising' THEN 8
        WHEN 'Technology & Software' THEN 9
        WHEN 'Professional Services' THEN 10
        WHEN 'Depreciation & Amortization' THEN 11
        WHEN 'Insurance' THEN 12
        WHEN 'Travel & Entertainment' THEN 13
        WHEN 'Utilities' THEN 14
        WHEN 'Other Operating Expenses' THEN 15
        WHEN 'Operating Income' THEN 16
        WHEN 'Interest Expense' THEN 17
        WHEN 'Tax Provision' THEN 18
        WHEN 'Net Income' THEN 19
        ELSE 99
    END

datasets.name: ds_balance_sheet_kpis
queryLines:
SELECT
    CAST(ar_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ar_balance,
    CAST(ap_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ap_balance,
    CAST(inventory_value AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS inventory_value,
    CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS cash_position,
    CAST(working_capital AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS working_capital,
    CAST(dso_days AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS dso_days,
    CAST(dpo_days AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS dpo_days,
    ROUND(CAST(ar_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / NULLIF(CAST(ap_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)), 0), 2) AS current_ratio
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.working_capital
WHERE period = '2026-01'

datasets.name: ds_ar_ap_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    CAST(ar_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ar_balance,
    CAST(ap_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ap_balance,
    CAST(ar_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(ap_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS net_ar_ap,
    CAST(dso_days AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS dso_days,
    CAST(dpo_days AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS dpo_days
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.working_capital
ORDER BY period

datasets.name: ds_working_capital_components
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    CAST(ar_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS accounts_receivable,
    CAST(inventory_value AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS inventory,
    -CAST(ap_balance AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS accounts_payable_neg,
    CAST(working_capital AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS net_working_capital
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.working_capital
ORDER BY period

datasets.name: ds_cash_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS cash_position,
    LAG(CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS prior_month_cash,
    CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))
      - COALESCE(LAG(CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))) OVER (ORDER BY period), 0) AS net_cash_change
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.working_capital
ORDER BY period

datasets.name: ds_actual_vs_budget_trend
datasets.displayName: Actual vs Budget vs Forecast – Revenue (12 Months)
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS actual_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(budget_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS budget_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(forecast_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS forecast_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(prior_year AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS prior_year_revenue
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period

datasets.name: ds_revenue_by_type_trend
datasets.displayName: Revenue Trend – Product vs Service (12 Months)
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Product Revenue'
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS product_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item = 'Service Revenue'
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS service_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
             THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period

datasets.name: ds_margin_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
    bf_rev.period,
    bf_rev.total_revenue,
    bf_gp.gross_profit,
    bf_oi.operating_income,
    bf_ni.net_income,
    ROUND(100.0 * bf_gp.gross_profit / NULLIF(bf_rev.total_revenue, 0), 1) AS gross_margin_pct,
    ROUND(100.0 * bf_oi.operating_income / NULLIF(bf_rev.total_revenue, 0), 1) AS operating_margin_pct,
    ROUND(100.0 * bf_ni.net_income / NULLIF(bf_rev.total_revenue, 0), 1) AS net_margin_pct
FROM (
    SELECT period,
           SUM(CASE WHEN line_item IN ('Product Revenue', 'Service Revenue')
                    THEN CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue
    FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast GROUP BY period
) bf_rev
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT period,
           SUM(CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS gross_profit
    FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast WHERE line_item = 'Gross Profit' GROUP BY period
) bf_gp ON bf_rev.period = bf_gp.period
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT period,
           SUM(CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS operating_income
    FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast WHERE line_item = 'Operating Income' GROUP BY period
) bf_oi ON bf_rev.period = bf_oi.period
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT period,
           SUM(CAST(actual_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS net_income
    FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.budget_forecast WHERE line_item = 'Net Income' GROUP BY period
) bf_ni ON bf_rev.period = bf_ni.period
ORDER BY bf_rev.period

datasets.name: ds_cash_flow_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
    period,
    CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS cash_position,
    LAG(CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS prior_month_cash,
    CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))
      - COALESCE(LAG(CAST(cash_position AS DECIMAL(18,2))) OVER (ORDER BY period), 0) AS net_cash_change
FROM christophe_chieu.demo_finance_department.working_capital
ORDER BY period

lines:

# P&L and Revenue Analysis — January 2026
